title: Virtual cluster lab monitoring (UI)
description: Golden lab SCADA deploy + operator shell.
prompt: Set up virtual cluster monitoring with three lab devices, hub bindings, an alert, and an operator shell I can open without the object tree.
uiJourney: Solutions / Deploy → Explorer verify devices → Operator
humanSteps: From Solutions (or Deploy panel) install/deploy the virtual cluster monitoring setup.
In Explorer verify three lab devices and hub bindings.
Confirm alert rule exists; open Operator UI for the cluster overview.
